description: Use this API to change the channel address and the channel identifier of a specified output channel. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = change_channel(chnarg,adrarg, idnarg)

parameters.name: chnarg
parameters.description: Channel number for which the channel address and/or channel identifier has to be changed. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: warnings - one or more of: - channel number is larger than NCHAN.
channel number is at or beyond the next available channel.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
